normalized_title: City of Joondalup Home Business Local Planning Policy
scope_summary: Sets criteria and standards for assessing development applications for Home Businesses across the whole City of Joondalup, so that businesses operated from dwellings do not compromise residential character or the amenity of adjoining properties. Restates the Local Planning Scheme No. 3 definitions of home business, home occupation and home office (the latter two not requiring development approval), and imposes assessment criteria covering car parking, operating hours, signage, location and management plans for home businesses with two external employees, and time-limited approvals. Prepared under Schedule 2, Part 2 of the deemed provisions of the Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015.

key_numeric_standards.value: 1 bay per customer and per employee (total equal to maximum permissible customers plus employees at any one time)

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: one sign on front facade of dwelling for a home business

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
State Planning Policy 7.3 Residential Design Codes Volume 1
State Planning Policy 7.3 Residential Design Codes Volume 2
City of Joondalup Local Planning Strategy
